model_patch:
diff --git a/src/node/vscodeSocket.ts b/src/node/vscodeSocket.ts
index 1bdb895..0fdf9b7 100644
--- a/src/node/vscodeSocket.ts
+++ b/src/node/vscodeSocket.ts
@@ -8,7 +8,14 @@ import { listen } from "./app"
 import { canConnect } from "./util"
 
 // Socket path of the daemonized code-server instance.
-export const DEFAULT_SOCKET_PATH = path.join(os.tmpdir(), "code-server-ipc.sock")
+// Includes the uid (or username as a fallback on systems without getuid, e.g.
+// Windows) so multiple users on the same machine don't collide on the same
+// socket file, which previously caused EPERM when one user tried to unlink
+// another user's socket.
+export const DEFAULT_SOCKET_PATH = path.join(
+  os.tmpdir(),
+  `code-server-ipc-${typeof process.getuid === "function" ? process.getuid() : os.userInfo().username}.sock`,
+)
 
 export interface EditorSessionEntry {
   workspace: {

diff --git a/src/browser/pages/login.html b/src/browser/pages/login.html index 6149ecf..c10a599 100644 --- a/src/browser/pages/login.html +++ b/src/browser/pages/login.html @@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="style-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; manifest-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:;" /> - code-server login + {{APP_NAME}} login @@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
-

Welcome to code-server

+

{{WELCOME_TEXT}}

Please log in below. {{PASSWORD_MSG}}
diff --git a/src/node/cli.ts b/src/node/cli.ts index bee8cbe..fa1be20 100644 --- a/src/node/cli.ts +++ b/src/node/cli.ts @@ -85,6 +85,8 @@ export interface UserProvidedArgs extends UserProvidedCodeArgs { "ignore-last-opened"?: boolean link?: OptionalString verbose?: boolean + "app-name"?: string + "welcome-text"?: string /* Positional arguments. */ _?: string[] } @@ -248,6 +250,15 @@ export const options: Options> = { `, deprecated: true, }, + + "app-name": { + type: "string", + description: "Name to display in the browser tab and title on the login page.", + }, + "welcome-text": { + type: "string", + description: "Custom text to show on the login page.", + }, } export const optionDescriptions = (opts: Partial>> = options): string[] => { diff --git a/src/node/routes/login.ts b/src/node/routes/login.ts index 2621472..67642df 100644 --- a/src/node/routes/login.ts +++ b/src/node/routes/login.ts @@ -35,10 +35,15 @@ const getRoot = async (req: Request, error?: Error): Promise => { passwordMsg = "Password was set from $HASHED_PASSWORD." } + const appName = req.args["app-name"] || "code-server" + const welcomeText = req.args["welcome-text"] || `Welcome to ${appName}` + return replaceTemplates( req, content .replace(/{{PASSWORD_MSG}}/g, passwordMsg) + .replace(/{{APP_NAME}}/g, escapeHtml(appName)) + .replace(/{{WELCOME_TEXT}}/g, escapeHtml(welcomeText)) .replace(/{{ERROR}}/, error ? `
${escapeHtml(error.message)}
` : ""), ) }

index 757e9f7..66f424a 100644
--- a/src/node/routes/errors.ts
+++ b/src/node/routes/errors.ts
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ import { WebsocketRequest } from "../../../typings/pluginapi"

 import { rootPath } from "../constants"

-import { getMediaMime } from "../util"
+import { escapeHtml, getMediaMime } from "../util"
 
 const notFoundCodes = ["ENOENT", "EISDIR", "FileNotFound"]
 export const errorHandler: express.ErrorRequestHandler = async (err, req, res, next) => {
@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@ export const errorHandler: express.ErrorRequestHandler = async (err, req, res, n
       replaceTemplates(req, content)
         .replace(/{{ERROR_TITLE}}/g, status)
         .replace(/{{ERROR_HEADER}}/g, status)
-        .replace(/{{ERROR_BODY}}/g, err.message),
+        .replace(/{{ERROR_BODY}}/g, escapeHtml(err.message)),
     )
   } else {
     res.json({

diff --git a/src/vs/workbench/contrib/terminal/browser/links/terminalLocalLinkDetector.ts b/src/vs/workbench/contrib/terminal/browser/links/terminalLocalLinkDetector.ts
index 48e5c06..7c5f79f 100644
--- a/src/vs/workbench/contrib/terminal/browser/links/terminalLocalLinkDetector.ts
+++ b/src/vs/workbench/contrib/terminal/browser/links/terminalLocalLinkDetector.ts
@@ -53,6 +53,7 @@ export const lineAndColumnClause = [
 	'((\\S*)[\'"],((\\d+)(:(\\d+))?))', // "(file path)",45 [see #78205]
 	'((\\S*) on line ((\\d+)(, column (\\d+))?))', // (file path) on line 8, column 13
 	'((\\S*):line ((\\d+)(, column (\\d+))?))', // (file path):line 8, column 13
+	'((\\S*): line ((\\d+)(, col (\\d+))?))', // (file path): line 8, col 13 [see gulp-eslint "compact" formatter]
 	'(([^\\s\\(\\)]*)(\\s?[\\(\\[](\\d+)(,\\s?(\\d+))?)[\\)\\]])', // (file path)(45), (file path) (45), (file path)(45,18), (file path) (45,18), (file path)(45, 18), (file path) (45, 18), also with []
 	'(([^:\\s\\(\\)<>\'\"\\[\\]]*)(:(\\d+))?(:(\\d+))?)' // (file path):336, (file path):336:9
 ].join('|').replace(/ /g, `[${'\u00A0'} ]`);
